form.formComment: Returns from a ten weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a minor placing (16.90) over 300m at this track. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Rates strongly and can return in winning form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a ten weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a minor placing (16.90) over 300m at this track. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Rates strongly and can return in winning form.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Staying Alive beaten 1.1 lengths (16.93) in a Grade 5. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Staying Alive beaten 1.1 lengths (16.93) in a Grade 5. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: Has been in the money at last four starts, the latest at big odds when third (16.75) at this track. Has a low draw. Top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the money at last four starts, the latest at big odds when third (16.75) at this track. Has a low draw. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 300m at this track, beaten 3.5 lengths (17.07) behind Little Bullet in a Mix 5 on March 30. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth over 300m at this track, beaten 3.5 lengths (17.07) behind Little Bullet in a Mix 5 on March 30. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a seventh over 300m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a seventh over 300m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in six tries. Last start 7th over 300m at this track. This looks too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in six tries. Last start 7th over 300m at this track. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a eighth (20.70) in a MX 5 at Q Lakeside and returns after a four months break. Looks a danger to the top hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ended last campaign with a eighth (20.70) in a MX 5 at Q Lakeside and returns after a four months break. Looks a danger to the top hope.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fifth (20.07) over 352m at Q Lakeside. Has claims on best form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Mix 5 on April 9 over 520m at Q Parklands behind Breakout Lad beaten 10 lengths (30.42). Looks a strong winning hope.
